reviews.review_description: This app was absolutely horrible, impossible to use, supposed to be relaxing, and it was very frustrating. I’m trying to get a refund and it won’t let me. ￼
Bad stick drift,no handtracking,cant use color palettes and over priced. Do not buy

As you learn how to draw and paint it may take time to get use to fact you painting in digital studio but once you get use to touches and how to use your tools them every things else is up to your imagination, the environment is very nice, only problem is the broswer it is very slow you can not follow tutorials unless you got a lot of patience. But overall the apps have all have a lot of features and feels real studio.
I sent to a friend and they never opened it
i have mild stick drift and although the turning sucks a bit it stops after a while and it’s very easy to paint, quite cheap and fun to play.

I was very surprised at how real the application of the paint looked I paint in real life, so this was like I moved my studio to another part of the world. No paint to clean up and my cats can't knock over my water! I really enjoyed this app.
A relaxing and calming game, with realistic painting physics. Amazing!
Very calming, but what if it was multiplayer or you could burn your painting if you didn’t like it

So many bugs. It's super touchy at times, and nearly unresponsive at others. But by far the worst is the crashing. Even if it shows the auto save feature previously, I often lose almost entire paintings worth of work. Incredibly discouraging. But when it does work, it works amazingly. I've been attempting to paint in it for quite some time now and have had a lot of fun. But the bugs, oh... The bugs....

I have painted on canvas for a very long time ( more than 20 years ) and I love the way Brushworks VR feels, it's pretty simple to learn, things just came naturally it seemed. There are a few bugs in the app for me, but that is to be expected, hope they can fix them soon.
love this so much and just purchased the full version- I can’t get the browser to work! no music no YouTube so I can have painting lessons. Anybody know what’s wrong?

reviews.review_title: Better than Vermillion in my opinion
reviews.review_description: So I've downloaded a few painting and art apps, in and outta app lab and sidequest quest as well as official releases. Brushwork has made things much nicer. It's easier to move your tools, palette and easel than the other apps I found. YouTube works great for tutorials and music plus they have some preloaded. The room is nice and they have passthrough mode. YOU CAN HANG AND DISPLAY your art which is a no brainier and appreciated. Not to mention going in and out of the room and having different environments is very nice as well. There are bugs but it just came out and is still in applab so for me 14 and change after tax was a great purchase. One that does not even make me think of a refund. Oh and the sketch work is nice too 😊  Thanks guys I do hope for some updates for the bugs like loading but other than that, ace job. I much prefer this over vermillion VR
This is accurate and great project

Brushwork VR's convenience of painting spontaneously, ANYWHERE, is incredible. The tools are fun to use and are really expressive on the canvas. One of my FAVORITE things about Brushwork is the true-to-life blending of colors: a rarity for most digital painting programs. Not worrying about wasting paint or canvas helps you loosen up on the "this precious canvas must be painted PERFECTLY" feeling, resulting in explorations and experimentation in ways you may not try IRL. I <3 Brushwork!

This app keeps closing on me and tells me brushwork has stopped working, would like to close or wait, it won't let me finish a painting, seems like a wast of money at this point. I have use the website version a few times and never had issues, so I thought I would buy the full version, but seems like a mistake now

I love doing art in vr an i got tired of being limited on doing art in VRCHAT. Bought this art game an i absolutley love it, so many cool options an things to do with different canvas sizes n such. The only problems i have is sometimes the erasers or blending stick doesnt work or the pens are highlighted for some reason but a a simple restart will fix. Also the pens stop working if ur too close to the edge of the canvas. I also was working on some art an it deleted itself once i had to reload the game. I guess im not too upset about it but it wasnt so nice.
(Edit: I spent a long time doing another artwork only for it to delete itself. I do have auto save every 5 minutez but i guess it never saved, i gotta take a star away for that one because that was such a good piece just gone to waste.)

Brilliant app .but what I found  the game could have a lot more detail Description How to set the game up and use the tools and when I want from one room to another you could end up leaving my Easel behind. Or  paint brushes behind. They get separated if you could fix these things be brilliant.
I love this app. I truly do. It's allowed me to really cut loose and open up. I would have given a 5 star rating, but I can't access my previous projects. Hmu and hmo for a full 5 star rating. Deal?

I really enjoy this app. Very realistic.  I'm new at painting so this is helping me a lot. Question... How do I get my paintings in the Gallery? The doors open for me but I can't enter. Once in a while it crashes and im thrown out. Please help.

reviews.review_title: It’s buggy, but I see the vision
reviews.review_description:
I enjoy painting with this app, and have been using it for the last couple of days. But, as all early access games are, it’s a bit buggy. 

One, if I sign into my account through the app, it immediately boots me out one the sign in is successfully. I can no longer get into the app, and have to reinstall the app to use it again. 

Two, after the game crashed because of low memory, I could no longer access the palette or web browser (I tried hiding, and unhiding them. Did not work. Moved the easel multiple times and repeated the processes to no avail). 

Also a suggestion for a feature: Locking the movement of the easel. I want to stick my head closer to the canvas without it moving away from me (I know there’s a zoom feature, but the easel movement isn’t pleasant)
